source_pr.title: expresssion: fix unstable time_vec_test
source_pr.body:
<!-- Thank you for contributing to TiDB!

PR Title Format:
1. pkg [, pkg2, pkg3]: what's changed
2. *: what's changed

-->

### What problem does this PR solve?

Issue Number: close https://github.com/pingcap/tidb/issues/25169   close https://github.com/pingcap/tidb/issues/25072 <!-- REMOVE this line if no issue to close -->

Problem Summary:

TiDB has DST time problme, so we need to generate correct time to test vec/non-vec expression correctness.

### What is changed and how it works?

Proposal: [xxx](url) <!-- REMOVE this line if not applicable -->

What's Changed:
1. Generate time that can switch back and forth between golang.time and types.time
2. Change tso generator's ranger [2000-01-01 00:00:01, +inf] in test.

How it Works:

### Related changes

### Check List <!--REMOVE the items that are not applicable-->

Tests <!-- At least one of them must be included. -->

- Unit test

Side effects

### Release note <!-- bugfixes or new feature need a release note -->

- No release note <!-- Please write a release note here to describe the change you made when it is released to the users of TiDB. If your PR doesn't involve any change to TiDB(like test enhancements, RFC proposals...), you can write `No release note`. -->
